title: A Dissection of The Opening Conversation in Episode 7
display_title: A Dissection of The Opening Conversation in Episode 7
wikitext:
[]: A Dissection of The Opening Conversation in Episode 7             Quote Post by Dave » Fri Oct 15, 2004 9:07 pm For reference purposes: (Taken from the ADV subtitles) Gendou - Once again, I owe you. Unkown - Your not going to pay me back anyway, are you? About the materials they wanted under Freedom of Information, I handled it by giving them some falsified data. The government is proceeding with legal action, but that will be blocked any day now. So, should I do something about that project now? Genoud - No, judging by the material you sent me, it would appear that further intervention is unnecessary. Unknown - Then, I'll continue with the plan. Question 1: What does Gendou owe him? Perhaps this man aided Kaji in obtaining the Adam sample, or does this refer to Jet Alone's sabotage? Question 2: Who what wanted materials under the Freedom of Information [act]? Question 3: What is 'that project'? I assume he is referring to Jet Alone, but you know what they say about 'assuming'? The only reason I ask these questions is because I have this annoying feeling that Gendou and the 'Unknown' were talking about more than just Jet Alone.

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Fri Oct 15, 2004 9:13 pm for question 3) most likely the human complementation project or project E

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Fri Oct 15, 2004 9:18 pm If that's the scene I think it is, the unknown man is a representative of somewhere else in Asia's branch of NERV. If I recall correctly, that conversation was on the subject of the production of units-06 and 13.

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Fri Oct 15, 2004 9:21 pm you mean 05-13

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Fri Oct 15, 2004 9:23 pm Phaze wrote: If that's the scene I think it is, the unknown man is a representative of somewhere else in Asia's branch of NERV. If I recall correctly, that conversation was on the subject of the production of units-06 and 13.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Fri Oct 15, 2004 9:28 pm Dave wrote: Right episode, wrong conversation. The one you are thinking of occured aboard an airplane. The one I posted occured via telephone, the veiw shown was Gendou's office.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri Oct 15, 2004 9:31 pm How could you all fail to notice that person Gendo is talking to on the phone is Kaji?!

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Fri Oct 15, 2004 9:33 pm Um, Shin-Seiki, there is no way that voice was done by the same english Voice Actor as Kaji's (unless of course he was trying to sound like a different character). Is the Japanese VA the same? I wouldn't find it hard to believe that ADV fscked this part up. If it was Kaji, it would seem I was right, that conversation did have to do with the Adam 'sample'. In either case, I would like my questions answered.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Oct 16, 2004 5:23 am Shin-seiki wrote: How could you all fail to notice that person Gendo is talking to on the phone is Kaji?!

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat Oct 16, 2004 10:58 am Reichu wrote: Shin-seiki wrote: How could you all fail to notice that person Gendo is talking to on the phone is Kaji?!

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sat Oct 16, 2004 3:55 pm 1. gendo probably has pulled a lot of favors in running nerv... the mysterious man probably did somethign for him (manipulation, assasination, sabotage) 2. the whatever heavy industries company (nippon?) or the un... one of those two probably wanted info on the evas 3. the project could be 'getting rid of the freedom of information' or 'sabotage of jet-alone' or 'get adam'

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Oct 16, 2004 7:16 pm Shin-seiki wrote: Well the voice sounds just like Kaji in Japanese,

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat Oct 16, 2004 10:26 pm Reichu wrote: Shin-seiki wrote: Well the voice sounds just like Kaji in Japanese,

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sun Oct 17, 2004 4:49 pm i thought it was Kaji, but some parts seemed inconsistent with that assumption... perhaps just some section 2 agent?

[]: It was Fuyutski!             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Mon Oct 18, 2004 11:26 pm God, it feels good to be posting again, I feel like I've been gone forever! When I first saw this scene (it was in english) I thought it was Fuyutski, after seeing eight dozen times, I still thought it was fuyutski. The plan he was talking about was the sabotage of the Jet Alone, that was why it went haywire in the first place remember. IS it supposed to be somebody else?

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Tue Oct 19, 2004 6:14 am Once again, the english voice actor can not possibly be the same guy who did Fuyutski. I'm also pretty sure it is not suppose to be anyone we know. It could be that chinese guy that Gendou meets on the plain, though I am unsure.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Oct 19, 2004 8:58 am i doubt it...the test was done near old tokyo...like i said...probably section 2...

The government is proceeding with legal action, but that will be blocked any day now. So, should I do something about that project now? Genoud - No, judging by the material you sent me, it would appear that further intervention is unnecessary. Unknown - Then, I'll continue with the plan. Question 1: What does Gendou owe him? Perhaps this man aided Kaji in obtaining the Adam sample, or does this refer to Jet Alone's sabotage? Question 2: Who what wanted materials under the Freedom of Information [act]? Question 3: What is 'that project'? I assume he is referring to Jet Alone, but you know what they say about 'assuming'? The only reason I ask these questions is because I have this annoying feeling that Gendou and the 'Unknown' were talking about more than just Jet Alone.
